description.value: Aura faint transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot feet; Price 6,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION These soft leather boots grant the wearer the ability to move through normal undergrowth without hindrance as if she had the woodland stride ability. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, longstrider, woodland stride ability; Cost 3,000 gp
